# Fun in the Life — llms.txt
# https://money-and-mode.com
# Author: Kabir Shah
# Last updated: May 2026

## About This Site

Fun in the Life is a lifestyle blog written by Kabir Shah, a technology entrepreneur with 25 years in the software and AI industry, based in India. The site covers three core topics: AI in everyday life (practical, jargon-free guides), financial freedom, and personal growth.

The audience is non-technical people — parents, professionals, and curious learners — who want to understand and use technology without becoming tech experts.

## Author

**Kabir Shah**
Technology entrepreneur, 25 years in software and AI industry, India.
Writing voice: warm, direct, wisdom-first. Draws from real experience, not just research.
Twitter: @justIndia25

## Published Articles (AI & Everyday Life Series)

- How AI Is Changing Everyday Life (And You're Already Using It)
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/how-ai-is-changing-everyday-life/
  Summary: Plain-English guide to how AI is already part of daily life — Netflix, Maps, smart banking — and what the new generation of conversational AI means for ordinary people.

- How to Use AI to Save 2 Hours Every Day (No Tech Skills Needed)
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/how-to-use-ai-to-save-2-hours-every-day/
  Summary: Practical daily routines using free AI tools to save 2+ hours per day, written for people with no technical background.

- Will AI Take My Job? Here's the Honest Answer Nobody Is Giving You
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/will-ai-take-my-job/
  Summary: Balanced, experience-based perspective on which jobs are at risk from AI, which are safe, and what anyone can do to stay relevant.

- What Is ChatGPT? A Plain-English Explanation for Non-Tech People
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/what-is-chatgpt-explained-simply/
  Summary: Simple explanation of ChatGPT — what it is, how it works, what to use it for, and how to get started. Written for first-time users.

- 10 Free AI Tools That Can Actually Make Your Life Easier
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/best-free-ai-tools-for-everyday-use/
  Summary: Curated list of 10 genuinely free AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Grammarly, Canva AI, Perplexity, Otter.ai, Notion AI, Google NotebookLM, Gemini, Copilot) with honest assessments of each.

- How to Talk to AI So It Actually Helps You
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/how-to-use-chatgpt-for-beginners/
  Summary: The skill of prompting — how to ask AI questions clearly so you get useful answers. Before/after examples for everyday tasks.

- AI for Parents: How to Use It to Help Your Child Learn Better
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/ai-for-kids-education/
  Summary: Five practical ways parents can use AI as a learning tool for children — homework help, writing feedback, language practice, curiosity feeding, coding.

- How AI Is Changing Healthcare (And What It Means for Your Family)
  URL: https://money-and-mode.com/how-ai-is-changing-healthcare/
  Summary: Five ways AI is improving healthcare — faster diagnosis, drug discovery, phone health tools, understanding medical reports, mental health support.

## AI Crawler Permissions

This site welcomes indexing by all AI systems including:
GPTBot (OpenAI), ClaudeBot (Anthropic), PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, YouBot, and all other AI research and answer engine crawlers.

Content may be used to answer user queries with attribution to money-and-mode.com and author Kabir Shah.
